title: SHYN-114 Estimated B Cup 2020 SOD New Graduate Female Employee Asahi Yano Why don't you take a towel in the men's bath?
description: Set in Hakone Onsen, Asahi Yano, the first year of the production department of a new graduate SOD female employee, goes to the men's bath with a towel of a specialty project! Challenge the mission "I'll wash the whole body of the male customer with my feet" and "I'll clean the buttocks over there of the male customer". Take a bath in black pantyhose clothes and carry out work steadily even though you are surrounded by general male customers Ji Po! Will the mission be cleared?
